---
title: "roylib.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mur-sst.html)

Workflow-specific configuration and GCS publishing utilities for the MUR SST workflow.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mur-daily-workflows/src/roylib.py >}}
```

:::
